_comment: Merge this into ~/.claude/settings.json (user) or .claude/settings.json (project) to enable Behdad's execution-layer fix gate. Replace <ABSOLUTE-PATH-TO-SKILL> with where this skill actually lives (e.g. C:/Users/you/.claude/skills/better-call-behdad). Do NOT use ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} here: during an audit that variable resolves to the AUDITED repo, not the skill, and the hook would silently not run. platform/claude/install.py writes the correct absolute path for you. The hook is inert unless BEHDAD_ACTIVE=1, so it is safe to leave installed.
